code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Client
    participant MatrixServer
    participant Federation
    participant Recipient
    participant Database

    User->>Client: Compose message
    Client->>Client: Encrypt (E2EE)
    Client->>MatrixServer: Send encrypted message
    MatrixServer->>MatrixServer: Store message
    MatrixServer->>Database: Persist to PostgreSQL
    MatrixServer->>Federation: Forward to recipient's server
    Federation->>Recipient: Deliver message
    Recipient->>RecipientClient: Push notification
    RecipientClient->>RecipientClient: Decrypt message
    RecipientClient->>Recipient: Display message

    Note over User,Recipient: End-to-End Encrypted Communication

repo_description: REChain ®️ 🪐 Platform encourages collaborative communication through features such as threads, allowing users to organize discussions and streamline conversations. The inclusion of polls enhances deci

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Matrix消息发送的完整时序图，核心是展示E2EE端到端加密在整个流程中是怎么工作的。参与者从User开始，经过Client、MatrixServer，还要考虑跨服务器的Federation，最后到Recipient。
明白，那数据持久化这块需要体现吗？比如MatrixServer把消息存到数据库？还有Recipient那边应该也有Client吧，需要拆成Recipient和RecipientClient两个参与者吗？
对，加上Database，用PostgreSQL。Recipient那边确实要拆，推送通知和本地解密是在RecipientClient上完成的。所以完整参与者是：User、Client、MatrixServer、Federation、Recipient、RecipientClient、Database，一共七个。
好，参与者都建好了。我先画主流程：User在Client上Compose message，然后Client本地做Encrypt，这是E2EE的关键，加密完再Send encrypted message到MatrixServer。
MatrixServer收到后要先Store message，然后Persist到PostgreSQL，这两个是内部步骤。接着走Federation Forward到对方服务器，最后Deliver给Recipient。
Recipient收到后，是RecipientClient先处理Push notification，然后在本地Decrypt message，最后Display给Recipient，这样对吗？
没错，Decrypt和Display都在RecipientClient本地完成，这才是真正的端到端加密——消息在传输和存储中都是密文，只有RecipientClient能解开。最后加个Note覆盖整个流程，标注"End-to-End Encrypted Communication"。
完成了，从User Compose到Recipient Display，中间经过Client加密、MatrixServer存储、Federation转发、RecipientClient解密，整个E2EE流程都覆盖到了，Note也加上了。
